name: Potato and Onion Gratin
recipeIngredient: 4 quarts sweet red onion, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil and bacon fat in a large saucepan over low heat.
2. Add onions, garlic, thyme, and scallions. Cover and cook for 10 minutes.
3. Remove from heat and set aside.
4. Arrange a layer of sliced potatoes at the bottom of a buttered baking pan or casserole dish.
5. Season the potatoes lightly with salt and pepper.
6. Spread a thin layer of the onion mixture on top of the potatoes.
7. Continue to build layers, finishing with a layer of potatoes.
8. Combine butter and breadcrumbs in a bowl and mix well.
9. Spread the mixture evenly over the potatoes.
10. Bake at 425°F until the gratin is golden brown on top.
Serves: 50
